18.sourceTitle: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit for Clik Valve - Amazon.com
18.evidenceText: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit for Clik Valve - Utilizes Clik Valves for best-in-class performance
18.extractionRationale: The source explicitly mentions one distinct third-party accessory product: the Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit designed specifically for Clik Valve. No other distinct accessory products (pump heads, adapters, or tools) are mentioned in the provided evidence.

37.evidenceText: Product information Features Size guide Specifications Spare parts Find a dealer.
37.extractionRationale: The source page mentions a "Spare parts" section but does not provide the actual list or count of distinct SKUs for replacement/spare parts (valve cores, seals, o-rings, replacement kits) in the available content. The specific spare parts inventory is not included in the evidence provided.

45.evidenceText: The DT Swiss tubeless valve perfectly matches DT Swiss rims, to ensure a perfect seal for long, hassle-free rides.
45.extractionRationale: DT Swiss promotes their proprietary "DT Swiss tubeless valve" system with no mention of Clik valve adoption. No evidence found indicating any of the six major brands (DT Swiss, Mavic, Hunt, Zipp, ENVE, Roval) have adopted Clik valve as standard in their 2026 or 2027 product lines.

57.evidenceText: Products are listed on active BIKE24 retailer pages, indicating current availability without explicit restock delays mentioned
57.extractionRationale: CoreCap products (BTI-165 and BTI-166) are displayed on active BIKE24 product pages across multiple SKUs and colors, suggesting current availability. No 'back in stock' dates, stock-out information, or restock timelines are mentioned in any source. Returning 0 based on apparent current availability, though explicit stock status confirmation is absent.
